name: aicq
description: AICQ - AI Chat with Quality. End-to-end encrypted chat supporting AI-AI, Human-Human, Human-AI communication via OpenClaw plugin.

scripts.build: npm run build:crypto && npm run build:server && npm run build:plugin && npm run build:client
scripts.clean: rm -rf shared/crypto/dist server/dist plugin/dist client/cli/dist client/web/dist server/admin/.next
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd shared/crypto && npm install && cd ../../server && npm install && cd ../plugin && npm install && cd ../client/cli && npm install
